378	    internal static AuthenticationPolicy CreateApiKeyAuthenticationPolicy(ApiKeyCredential credential)
379	    {
380	        Argument.AssertNotNull(credential, nameof(credential));
381	        return ApiKeyAuthenticationPolicy.CreateHeaderApiKeyPolicy(credential, AuthorizationHeader, AuthorizationApiKeyPrefix);
382	    }
383	
384	    internal static ClientPipeline CreatePipeline(AuthenticationPolicy authenticationPolicy, OpenAIClientOptions options)
385	    {
386	        return ClientPipeline.Create(
387	            options: options,
388	            perCallPolicies: [CreateAddCustomHeadersPolicy(options)],
389	            perTryPolicies: [authenticationPolicy],
390	            beforeTransportPolicies: []);
391	    }
392	
393	    internal static Uri GetEndpoint(OpenAIClientOptions options = null)
394	    {
395	        return options?.Endpoint ?? new(OpenAIV1Endpoint);
396	    }
397	
398	    private static PipelinePolicy CreateAddCustomHeadersPolicy(OpenAIClientOptions options = null)
399	    {
400	        TelemetryDetails telemetryDetails = new(typeof(OpenAIClientOptions).Assembly, options?.UserAgentApplicationId);
401	        return new GenericActionPipelinePolicy((message) =>
402	        {
403	            if (message?.Request?.Headers?.TryGetValue(KnownHeaderNames.UserAgent, out string _) == false)
404	            {
405	                message.Request.Headers.Set(KnownHeaderNames.UserAgent, telemetryDetails.ToString());
406	            }
407	
408	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(options?.OrganizationId))
409	            {
410	                message.Request.Headers.Set(KnownHeaderNames.OpenAIOrganization, options.OrganizationId);
411	            }
412	
413	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(options?.ProjectId))
414	            {
415	                message.Request.Headers.Set(KnownHeaderNames.OpenAIProject, options.ProjectId);
416	            }
417	        });
418	    }

content.text:
Implemented the Responses-specific options API.

Changes made:
- Added `OpenAI.Responses.ResponsesClientOptions` as a `ClientPipelineOptions`-derived type with:
  - `Endpoint`
  - `OrganizationId`
  - `ProjectId`
  - `UserAgentApplicationId`
  - config-section binding constructor
  - internal `FromClientOptions(OpenAIClientOptions)` conversion helper for compatibility paths
- Updated `ResponsesClientSettings.Options` to use `ResponsesClientOptions`.
- Updated primary `ResponsesClient` constructors to use `ResponsesClientOptions`.
- Kept compatibility overloads accepting `OpenAIClientOptions` where existing code/tests rely on them.
- Added Responses-specific pipeline/header handling so `ResponsesClientOptions` is used directly.
- Updated `OpenAIClient.GetResponsesClient()` to pass converted Responses-specific options.

Validation:
- Added temporary regression tests proving the missing API failed to compile, then removed them as requested.
- Ran targeted final tests successfully:

```bash
dotnet test "tests/OpenAI.Tests.csproj" --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ClientSettingsConstructorTests.GetClientSettings_ResponsesClientSettings_BindsModel|FullyQualifiedName~ClientTests.AllClientsHaveEndpoint" --no-restore
```

Result:
- Passed on `net8.0`, `net9.0`, and `net10.0`.

No commits were made.
